title: Copper's
description: This mod will change the way you use copper.
body:
This mod will change the way you use copper.

Indeed, this material is rarely used in normal survival.

So I've decided to add various functions to it:

-Copper weapons, tools and armour are added, crafted with copper ingots in the same way as other iron tools and armour, for example.
-A new portal igniter has been added: the Flint & Copper, as well as a new portal, made of copper blocks in the same way as a Nether portal, which can be ignited with the Flint & Copper, crafted with a copper ingot and a flint.
-This portal will take you to a new dimension: The Copper Dimension! Here you'll find two biomes: the copper biome and the oxidised copper biome. With them, you'll discover two new types of wood and foliage.
-You'll also come across a new structure: the Copper Temple. Despite the desert zombies inside, I advise you to venture into this temple, where you'll find a wealth of minerals.

There are also a few details in this mod, such as particles specific to the mod, a flower that will slow you down slightly and reduce your jump height, and the colour of the sky that will adapt to the biome.

I hope you have fun!
